\tzpentry{ID3458}{Concept Clusters Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3458 introduces Concept Clusters Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ N = \begin{cases} n, & \text{if }n\text{ is even}\\ 2n, & \text{if }n\text{ is odd} \end{cases} \]
